description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the golang:latest Docker image with a postgres:latest service and set POSTGRES_ADDR, POSTGRES_DB, POSTGRES_USER, POSTGRES_PASSWORD variables. Define three stages: prepare, test, and build. In the prepare stage add a dep job that runs go get -u github.com/golang/dep/... then dep ensure, caches the vendor directory and stores it as an artifact. In the test stage add a lint job that runs go get -u github.com/golang/lint/golint then golint $(go list ./... | grep -v /vendor/), and a test job that runs go test $(go list ./... | grep -v "vendor\|driver\|scheduler"). In the build stage add a build job that runs go build and publishes the server directory as an artifact, and apply a before_script that symlinks /builds to /go/src/gitlab.com and cd's into the project for all jobs.
